infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: ORYX reads your heart rate, HRV, sleep, and steps from Apple Health to calculate your daily readiness score and training recommendations.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: ORYX writes workout sessions you log to Apple Health so your training is recorded across your devices.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: ORYX uses your camera to capture workout photos and profile pictures.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: ORYX accesses your photo library so you can upload workout and profile photos.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: ORYX uses your location to tag workouts with where you trained.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: ORYX uses your location to tag workouts with where you trained.

plugins.photosPermission: ORYX accesses your photo library so you can upload workout and profile photos.
plugins.cameraPermission: ORYX uses your camera to capture workout photos and profile pictures.
ORYX uses your camera to capture workout photos and profile pictures.
